issues.description: Action should be 'AttachDon' (activate/set up DON!! cards), not 'GiveDon' (which grants DON!! tokens to opponent or adds to pool). 'Set up' means making DON!! cards active.
Missing condition/action for the restriction: 'you cannot play Character cards with a base cost of 5 or more during this turn'. This is a duration-limited play restriction that must be captured.
Missing 'rested' keyword state. Action should specify that the Character is played in a rested state, not active.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[On Play] Set up to 2 of your DON!! cards as active. Then, you cannot play Character cards with a base cost of 5 or more during this turn.
[On K.O.] Play up to 1 Character card with a cost of 5 or less from your hand rested.
